calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s motion to vacate the February 10, 2011 judgment and dismissal of the case with prejudice is granted. Good cause shown. The court will sign the proposed order submitted by the plaintiff.

Order signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
